gaps.gap_description: Time-period mismatch: regulation requires 12 but current policy specifies 24.

current_policy.text: KYC review for high-risk customers is performed every 24 months

required_change.requirement_text:
Section 4.2 - KYC Review Frequency
Financial institutions must perform KYC customer reviews every 12 months for high-risk customers.

evidence.source_quote:
Section 4.2 - KYC Review Frequency
Financial institutions must perform KYC customer reviews every 12 months for high-risk customers.

remediation.recommended_action: Update 'POL-001' to change the retention/review period from 24 to 12 as required by Section 4.2 - KYC Review Frequency.

gaps.gap_description: Frequency mismatch: regulation requires daily action but current policy only specifies weekly.

required_change.requirement_text:
Section 5.1 - Suspicious Activity Monitoring
Institutions must monitor suspicious transactions daily and report high-risk activity within 48 hours.

evidence.source_quote:
Section 5.1 - Suspicious Activity Monitoring
Institutions must monitor suspicious transactions daily and report high-risk activity within 48 hours.

remediation.recommended_action: Update 'POL-002' and supporting systems to increase monitoring frequency from weekly to daily.

human_oversight.review_reason: Frequency increase may require system or workflow changes; human sign-off needed.

gaps.gap_description: Time-period mismatch: regulation requires 5 but current policy specifies 3.

current_policy.text: Evidence and audit logs are retained for 3 years

required_change.requirement_text:
Section 6.3 - Evidence Retention
Compliance teams must retain evidence and audit logs for at least 5 years.

evidence.source_quote:
Section 6.3 - Evidence Retention
Compliance teams must retain evidence and audit logs for at least 5 years.

remediation.recommended_action: Update 'POL-003' to change the retention/review period from 3 to 5 as required by Section 6.3 - Evidence Retention.
